title: Narrative decomposition — half-story ordering
collected_by: cursor session (Fable 5), July 22 late-night; verdict registered same session
corpus: C-NAT-halfstory (always-swap of story halves; within-half sentence order intact; doc_seed 3005)

seed_robustness_extension.collected_by: physics room session (Sonnet 4.6), 2026-07-24 ~12:18 AM MDT; volume get (modal volume ls/get without billing trigger)
seed_robustness_extension.verdict: 5-seed median n_deep = 3 >= 3: H_deep_recovery CONFIRMED with 5-seed robustness. Two of five seeds sit at or near the shuffle floor (s1=1, s3=2); three above (s0=3, s2=4, s4=4). The effect is real but carries genuine seed variance. Proceed with exp-094 with confidence on the median; hold the variance as an honest caveat.

verdict.H_deep_recovery: CONFIRMED — n_deep median 3 >= 3 (values 3/1/4). Half-story local coherence begins recovering the deep conformal population; the minimum ordering unit is sub-arc.
verdict.H_deep_flat: FALSIFIED — the declared prior. Second falsified prior in the formation ladder (after exp-092 H_mono); the method working.
verdict.H_n_conf_recovery: CONFIRMED — n_conformal median 12 >= 10, all seeds >= 10; total conformal count re-enters the C-NAT band (11-15) while deep recovery is only partial (3 vs 5-7).
verdict.kill_criterion: NOT MET — requires n_conf >= 13 AND n_deep >= 5 (observed medians 12 and 3). Global arc still contributes; ordering hypothesis survives in weakened form.

honest_caveats: Seed spread on the primary observable is real and wide (5-seed values: 1/3/4/2/4): two of five seeds sit at or near the sentence-shuffle floor (s1=1, s3=2), three above (s0=3, s2=4, s4=4). The 5-seed median (3) meets the pre-registered robustness criterion but the variance is genuine: the half-story ordering recovers partial deep formation in most seeds, not all. This is a characterization of the effect, not a reason to dismiss it.
Deep-head deltas are high (0.64-0.94), far above the SYK window — consistent with exp-091's amended axis (SYK-near uninformative at this scale) but worth carrying.

The pre-registration's Measurement section says cutoff_low=3/max_lag=60, but the actual measure.py protocol (shared across the exp-062 series) fits [8,256] at seq 512. All ladder rungs are measured identically, so comparisons stand; the prereg boilerplate should be corrected in future rungs.
pos_enc verified against exp-062 train.py during registration: rotary (rotary_pct=0.25). exp-092's registry entry said 'learned' — mislabel, corrected 2026-07-22.
interpretation: Between k=3 blocks (n_deep 2) and half-story chunks (n_deep 3, with n_conf fully re-entering the natural band), local contiguous coherence does real work that block-2/3 shuffles cannot do — even with the global arc maximally disrupted (resolution always precedes setup). But recovery is partial: the full C-NAT deep population (5-7) still requires the arc. Two-component picture: a sub-arc component recoverable by half-story-length ordered chunks, and an arc component requiring beginning-to-end causal order. Next per prereg: finer gradation between k=3 and half-story (quarter-story / sliding window) to locate the half-recovery length.
